title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-276)
description: On March 25, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 18.10.1, 18.9.3 and 18.8.7
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 18.10.1, 18.9.3 and 18.8.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
